description: FocusedWorldStatus is a component that displays information about the currently focused world. It's used in the session tab in the dash.

fields.WorldName: The name of the currently focused world.
fields.RawWorldName: The raw unfiltered name of the currently focused world.
fields.SessionId: The session ID of the currently focused world.
fields.IsHost: Whether the user is the host of the focused world.
fields.CanSave: Whether the user is allowed to save the focused world.
fields.ShouldSave: Whether the focused world has unsaved changes or not.
fields.CanClose: Whether the focused world can be closed. False for the Local Home.
fields.RoleName: The name of the role that the user currently has in the focused world.
fields.UserCount: The amount of users currently in the focused world.
fields.ActiveUserCount: How many of the users in the focused world aren't AFK.
fields.MaxUserCount: The maximum amount of users that can be in the focused world.
fields.AccessLevel: The access level of the focused world.
fields.HideFromListing: Whether or not the focused world should not be shown in world listings or shown to other users.
fields.AwayKickEnabled: Whether the focused world has AFK kick enabled.
fields.AwayKickMinutes: How many minutes a user can be AFK before being kicked from the focused world.
fields.UnsafeMode: Whether the focused world is in unsafe mode, which allows for some features to work. Can only be true in private worlds.
